data.description: Healthcare costs are the most crucial daily expense voters want congress to address, According to source/ipsos poll.
Americans see cost of living as the most important issue in 2026 congressional elections: Source/Ipsos poll finds
Democrats hold advantage voters healthcare Republicans stronger on economy according to source/ipsos poll findings
FDA ISSUES EMERGENCY USE AUTHORIZATION FOR NEW WORLD SCREWWORM DRUG FOR DOGS

data.title: Bitcoin remains stable around $109K post-Trump's pardon of Binance's CZ, amidst EU crypto sanctions on Russian exchanges. Market sentiment affected.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin remains stable around $109,000 after former President Trump pardoned Binance's CEO. However, the European Union has placed sanctions on Russian cryptocurrency exchanges, causing an impact on market confidence.

data.title: Pennant Group (NASDAQ: PNTG) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5. Home health, hospice and senior living services.
data.description: In Eagle, Idaho, on October 24, 2025, The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PNTG), a company overseeing entities offering home health, hospice, and senior living services, shared plans to reveal its third quarter 2025 financial results on November 5, 2025.

data.title: Justin Boots introduces CPX Collection, setting new standards for Western craftsmanship with luxury materials and modern innovation.
data.description: Based in Fort Worth, Texas, Justin Boots, a prominent cowboy boot manufacturer established in 1879, has recently unveiled the CPX Collection. This new line showcases Western craftsmanship with a blend of luxury materials, modern innovation, and classic authenticity. Serving as a significant leap forward in the company's product offerings, the CPX Collection signifies a new chapter in Justin Boots' history.

data.title: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. delays Q3 2025 financial results release to Oct 28, 2025, with earnings call on Oct 29 at 10 am PST.
data.description: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GBFH) has rescheduled the release of its third quarter 2025 financial results to Tuesday, October 28, 2025, after the market closes. The earnings call is set for Wednesday, October 29, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. PST and will be conducted virtually with no physical attendance option available. Interested individuals can join online, following the change from the originally planned date of Monday, October 27, 2025.

data.title: Mike Selig, head of SEC crypto task force, chosen by Trump to lead CFTC report.
data.description: The latest update reveals that Selig, who serves as the chief counsel for the SEC's task force dedicated to cryptocurrencies, has been selected by the president to head the CFTC, as reported by Bloomberg.

data.title: BTC may surge towards $120,000 as sellers cap at $112,000. Technical data hints at explosive growth with end of October's macroeconomic calendar.
data.description: Sellers of Bitcoin have set a limit at $112,000, although various technical indicators and on-chain information indicate a forthcoming surge in price. The conclusion of the October US economic schedule points towards a potential rapid increase in value.

data.title: Binance founder CZ praised by US President, sparking talk of a comeback amid crypto industry support.
data.description: The United States President, Donald Trump, stated that Changpeng Zhao, the founder of Binance, received substantial backing from the cryptocurrency sector and was highly endorsed for a pardon.

data.title: Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve Gov. Lisa Cook had minimal market impact; S&P 500 unaffected.
data.description: President Trump's decision to dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook did not have a significant impact on the market on Tuesday. However, if his attempt to take control of the Fed is successful, the consequences are expected to escalate. The firing of Cook has not affected the S&P 500 as of now, but the potential repercussions are a concern for investors and the business community.

data.title: President Trump claims firing Federal Reserve Gov. Lisa Cook, she rebutted saying he lacks authority.
data.description: Late on Monday, President Donald Trump announced that he is terminating Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook from her position. Cook responded saying that he does not have the power to do so. The news was shared on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell hints at rate cuts, S&P 500 rises; Market sees 70% odds of rate cut next month.
data.description: There is a prevalent anticipation in the markets for a potential rate reduction next month, with the likelihood now standing at approximately 70%. Following Federal Reserve Chair Powell's indication that current conditions could justify rate cuts, the S&P 500 experienced a surge in response to his speech at Jackson Hole.

data.title: PPI inflation surge dampens Fed rate-cut expectations; Trump seeks significant half-point drop. S&P 500 declines.
data.description: The current administration under Trump is advocating for a 0.5% decrease in the upcoming month. Following higher than expected Producer Price Index (PPI) inflation data, expectations for a significant rate cut by the Federal Reserve have diminished. This economic development resulted in a decline in the S&P 500 index.

data.title: Core CPI inflation exceeds 3%, but won't deter Fed from rate cuts; S&P 500 increases.
data.description: Core CPI inflation has seen an increase, surpassing the 3% mark recently. Despite the rise, it is not significant enough to hinder the Federal Reserve from implementing rate cuts. The S&P 500 index experienced a rise following this news.

data.title: Job cuts surged by 140% from last year in July, as per new data. The Fed's inflation gauge exceeded expectations. S&P 500 rose.
data.description: In July, new data revealed a 140% surge in job cuts compared to the previous year. The Federal Reserve's preferred inflation measure exceeded expectations. Concurrently, the S&P 500 index experienced a rise.

data.title: Fed could consider rate cut after EU tariff deal and President Trump's trade deals ease inflation concerns.
data.description: The Federal Reserve could become less concerned about inflation driven by tariffs following President Trump's recent series of trade agreements. This development may potentially lead the Fed to consider the possibility of a rate cut after a deal regarding tariffs with the EU.

data.title: LVNBA and Christian Bishop team up to support 20 students from Black community at HBCU Classic.
data.description: In Las Vegas on October 24, 2025, the Las Vegas Chapter of the National Bar Association (LVNBA) revealed a significant collaboration with Christian Bishop, a prominent community figure and contender for Nevada Assembly District 29. This partnership aims to support and facilitate the participation of 20 students from the Black community.

data.title: New from Gala Games: VEXI Retro Radiowaves Collection, inspired by the 80s and 90s, includes Workforce & Mini Packs.
data.description: Gala Games has launched a new collection called VEXI Retro Radiowaves, which draws inspiration from the colorful decades of the 80s and 90s. This collection includes Workforce and Mini Packs tailored for digital fans.
